text:
申請更換服務保險顧問的指引
(只限個人保險產品)
1. 所需文件
 客戶申請書正本
2. 客戶申請書所載資料
 保單持有人姓名
 保單編號
 新服務保險顧問姓名
 新服務保險顧問編號
 保單持有人簽署
 簽署日期
3. 保障規定
 該保單現有服務保險顧問 (Current Servicing Insurance Advisor) 將獲給予為期十四
日的保障期。
 更換服務保險顧問保障規定通知，將透過宏利全接觸的「保險顧問通訊系統
(Agent Notification System - ANS）」發送至現有服務保險顧問 (Current Servicing
Insurance Advisor) 、新被委任服務保險顧問 (Proposed Servicing Insurance
Advisor) 及兩人的分區總監 (DD) 。
 更換服務保險顧問的申請會於十四日保障期結束後生效。
4. 申請資料齊備
 公司會向客戶發出確認函。
 更換服務保險顧問確認通知，亦將透過宏利全接觸的「保險顧問通訊系統 (Agent
Notification System - ANS）」發送至現有服務保險顧問 (Current Servicing
Insurance Advisor) 、新委任服務保險顧問 (New Assigned Servicing Insurance
Advisor) 及兩人的直屬經理。
5. 申請資料不全
 新被委任服務保險顧問會收到申請被拒通知，以與客戶作出相關跟進。
6. 遞交
 請將完整的申請書遞交至經銷報酬部(MT 22/F) 。

text:
Special Payout Instruction Form
特別收款安排指示表格
Important Note
重要事項
This form is applicable for policyowner to appoint his/her direct family member to act as payee to receive one-time payment of the policy with
amount not more than the following specified threshold on behalf the policyowner under special situation within twelve months. Please submit
this form together with the relevant payment withdrawal request form. In general, it takes a longer processing time for cheque issuance according
to this instruction form. The cheque will be delivered by the advisor once available. Manulife (International) Limited ("Manulife”) shall have the absolute
right and discretion to refuse or suspend the application and the application shall in any event be subject to Manulife’s due diligence clearance.
此表格適用於保單持有人基於特殊情況下，指定其直系家庭成員代表保單持有人作一次性並不多於保單款項的收款人。每份保單在12個月內，僅
可使用此指示一次。請將此表格連同有關提款指示一併遞交。此安排下所發行的支票通常需較長的處理時間，預備好的支票將安排保險顧問送遞。

If I am currently located within the People's Republic of China (excluding Hong Kong, Macao, and Taiwan), I hereby confirm to have

https://www.manulife.com.hk/en/individual/privacy-policy.html. These provisions contain details of the purposes and methods of

若本人目前身處於中華人民共和國境內（香港、澳門及台灣除外），本人確認已閱畢並明白該聲明以及《有關<中華人民共和國個人信
息保護法> 的私隱附錄( 為內地居民設定) 》(「私隱附錄」) 內含的條款。該私隱附錄可於宏利官方網站下載:

。該條款詳細說明了處理目的及方式，個人信息的種類，個人信息跨境

to come to Hong Kong to collect the payment in person. I have already exhausted all means but still not been able to receive the payment
issued by Manulife physically. I warrant and confirm all information and the documents provided under this form are true and accurate. I
hereby sign to confirm my irrevocable authorisation to Manulife for releasing the following payment requested by me under the said policy,
fully and directly to the payee mentioned below as my sole appointed representative, in any manner Manulife consider appropriate. I
understand and acknowledge that the said release of the payment constitutes good discharge of all liabilities and obligations of Manulife
in respect of the said payment under the said policy. I agree and undertake to indemnify Manulife for all claims, demands and losses which

conclusive. I sign, seal and deliver this document as a deed to and in favour of Manulife.

* Each primary hiring agent will be granted one PA Manutouch account for their PA. Regardless of the number of PAs an agent hired, only one PA
will be granted access to the PA Manutouch account. Additionally, the PA will only have access rights to the PA Manutouch account associated with
their primary hiring agent. Therefore, even if a PA is hired by multiple agents, they can only access the PA Manutouch account of their primary
hiring agent.
Terms and Conditions:
1. The PA Card and Access Card should not be borrowed / used by anyone other than the PA or the agent(s) who employ(s) or appoint(s) the
PA (the “Hiring Agent(s)”)
2. This Application should be countersigned by District Director or above.
3. If the PA is employed or appointed by more than one Hiring Agent (maximum 4 Hiring Agents) at the same time, unless provided otherwise,
the liabilities of the Hiring Agents to Manulife (International) Limited (“Manulife”) under these Terms and Conditions shall be joint and
several.
4. One agent can hire maximum 4 PAs.
5. Only one PA is allowed as District Secretary in a District.
6. The PA must carry his/her PA Card and Access Card at all times within the office premises of Manulife for identification purpose.
7. A handling fee of HK$200 shall be charged to the Primary Hiring Agent for re-issuing a replacement PA Card and a handling fee of HK$100
shall be charged to the Primary Hiring Agent for re-issuing a replacement Access Card. For termination of the employment or appointment
of the PA or resignation of the PA, the Primary Hiring Agent shall notify Manulife by submitting PA Deregistration Form no less than 7
working days before the PA’s last working day. The Primary Hiring Agent shall return the PA Card and Access Card to Manulife on or
before the PA’s last working day. Failure to return or delay in returning the PA Card and Access Card shall lead to a HK$200 penalty fee
for the PA Card and a HK$100 penalty fee for the Access Card payable by the Primary Hiring Agent immediately.

Account granted by Manulife. The PA and the Hiring Agent(s) shall indemnify Manulife for all demands, claims, loss, damages and
expenses arising out of any improper and/or illegal use of the PA Card, Access Card and PA Manutouch Account. The liability of the PA
and the Hiring Agent(s) is joint and several.
9. The provision of the information required in this form is a condition for the issuance of the PA Card and Access Card. The Hiring agent(s)
must ensure that they have complied with all the necessary requirements under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance in obtaining and/or
transferring the PA’s personal data to Manulife. The PA and the Hiring Agent(s) hereby declare that they have verified the correctness of
the PA’s personal data.

> Personal Assistant > PA Training Guide (Compliance Section)) and provide a copy of such to PA for his/her perusal upon
commencement of the PA’s employment.

schedule.

confidential information and other commercially sensitive information (“Confidential Information”). As a condition of providing you with
and/or allowing you access to the Confidential Information, we require you to furnish us with the undertakings, representations and
warranties set out below.
For the purposes of this Agreement, Confidential Information shall include:
i. any personal data of the customer(s) or client(s) (including potential customer(s) or client(s)) of Manulife or any of its subsidiaries or
associated companies (“Manulife Group”, collectively), or its authorized sub-contractors or agents;
ii. any information (including those in machine-readable form and those not reduced to writing) of a confidential or proprietary nature
including but not limited to any correspondence, technical and/or commercial information, know-how, methods of doing business,
construction techniques, discoveries, inventions (whether patentable or copyrightable or not), computer programs, data, designs,
equipment, formulae, prices, costs, suppliers and the like, whether written or oral from the Manulife Group or its authorized sub-
contractors or agents;
iii. any information relating to the business and affairs of the Manulife Group obtained directly or indirectly from Manulife, or acquired by
observation during visits to its premises or premises of its authorized sub-contractors, or acquired by virtue of or incidental to your
relationship with the Agent(s);
iv. the existence and contents of this Agreement; and
v. any information, record and data collected, received or produced in the course of performing the duties as PA.
UNDERTAKINGS
In consideration of the Confidential Information being made available to you by Manulife, you undertake to Manulife that:
1. You will only use the Confidential Information for the purposes for which it has been made available to you and will not at any time
prior to or during the duration of your employment with or appointment by the Hiring Agent(s) or at any time thereafter disclose any of
the Confidential Information to any other party, under any circumstances, other than with the prior written authorization of Manulife.
2. You will not make any copies of, or reproduce or modify any documents or extracts of documents containing Confidential Information
or any part thereof in any form, whether electronic or otherwise, or in any other way duplicate Confidential Information, except as is
reasonably required for the purpose for which the Confidential Information has been made available to you and in such
circumstances you will ensure that all such copies are treated as private and confidential.
3. Subject to the terms of this Agreement, you will at all times treat and safeguard as private and confidential all the Confidential
Information received by or held by you at any time and shall not forward Confidential Information to your personal email account.
4. You will, as far as possible, keep Confidential Information separate from all other documents and information you may receive or
hold.
5. You will keep Confidential Information secured and encrypted (if necessary) in accordance with the relevant instructions internal
rules and guidelines of Manulife (if any).
6. Upon request from Manulife, save and except as otherwise required by law, you will promptly and securely return or destroy all
Confidential Information which have been provided or made available to you by Manulife or its authorized sub-contractors and
agents together with any copies you have made or retained. Subject to applicable law, you will also permanently delete all
Confidential Information stored in any electronic or retrievable form whether on a tape or floppy or hard disc or compact disc or
similar medium.
7. You will not delegate or assign any of your above or other obligations in the absence of written authorisation from Manulife.
8. You will comply with all the applicable laws and regulations and the internal rules and guidelines of Manulife (if any).
9. You will notify Manulife immediately if your relationship with the Agent(s) ceases to have effect, expires or is terminated.

Internal Rules
1. Please read the “Roadshow Guidelines (for Hong Kong)” and “Do’s and Don’ts” in Manutouch before completing this
form.
2. Please submit the completed Roadshow Application Form (Form AS06) to AS at least 10 working days before start
date of roadshow.
3. For non-standard roadshow venue e.g. shops, promotion trucks, campus, hotel, exhibition venues etc, applicant
would be asked to submit additional supporting documents and it is subject to company's further approval. For
details, please refer to the Roadshow Guidelines Section IV - Roadshow Application Process and Use of Roadshow
Materials.
4. A copy of signed tenancy agreement/debit note with receipt issued by landlord should be submitted to AS before
start of roadshow.
5. Please submit all relevant documents by e-mail to roadshow_agency_support_hk@manulife.com.
6. Upon receipt of the form, AS staff will process the booking request and inform the applicant via email to confirm the
booking status and the related costs if any.
7. Any promotional or marketing materials not provided by the company shall be submitted to AS. Prior approval from
the company must be obtained before using these materials in any roadshow activities.
8. Please note the booking request shall be treated successful only when the applicant receives written confirmation
from AS. Any roadshow activity should not be conducted without AS’ approval.
9. Applicant should inform AS about any changes of the application (e.g. cancellation, venue change, materials
ordered, participant list, etc.) immediately via email communication. Any additional fees incurred due to such charge
would be borne by the respective agents.
10. All materials must be returned in good condition to MT 18 AS on the next working day morning after the roadshow.
Late charges of $100 per day would be implemented for late return.
11. The applicant will be liable for the cost of replacement or repairing if there is any damage or loss for the Requested
Items [2].
P.2 Form AS06 (12/2025)
Regulations
1. According to the Insurance Authority (“IA”) ‘s requirements, insurance agents shall not pay or offer to pay any rebate
of premium, commission or other incentive not specified in the policy as an inducement to any potential long term
insurance (including ILAS and non-ILAS policies) policyholder unless specifically authorized by the insurer.
根據保險業監管局（「保監局」）規定，保險代理除非獲得保險公司特別授權，否則不得提供或答應提供任何保費回
佣、佣金或其他在保單內沒有指定的優惠，誘使準保單持有人購買長期保險 (包括投資相連壽險及非投資相連壽險)。
2. According to MPFA and SFC requirements, intermediaries should not, directly or indirectly, offer any rebates, gifts or
incentives (including, without limitation, commissions or other monetary/non-monetary benefits) to any person or
client respectively for conducting selling activities in respect of MPF schemes/MPF constituent funds or investment
funds (unit trusts and mutual funds).
根據積金局及證監會規定，中介人不可直接或間接分別向任何人士或客戶提供任何回佣、禮物或優待(包括但不限於佣
金或其他金錢或非金錢形式的利益)，以銷售強積金計劃/強積金成分基金或投資基金 (單位信託及互惠基金)。
3. Please refer (1) Roadshow Guidelines (for Hong Kong) uploaded in ManuTouch and (2) Conduct in Focus (Issue 11) -
Mystery Shopping on Roadshow Activities “Do’s and Don’ts” available in website of Insurance Authority.

P.4 Form AS06 (12/2025)
Letter of Undertakings
(Required for Bookings with The Link Properties Limited Only)
Upon Manulife (International) Limited (“MIL”) submits the prescribed Application Form for Licence for Using the
Sales Kiosk (“Application”) dated [________________________________________ (DD/MM/YYYY)] as annexed
hereto to Link Properties Limited (“Licensor”) on our behalves in order to conduct roadshow(s) at the designated
sales kiosk provided by the Licensor, as per the Application Form, we hereby jointly and severally, unconditionally
and irrevocably AGREE, UNDERTAKE, GUARANTEE and INDEMNIFY MIL to act upon and adhere to the terms
and conditions set forth as follows:-
1. To pay the Licence Fee, the Security Deposit (if required) and any other expenses in full prior to commencement
of the Licence Period or as requested by MIL, whichever is earlier.
2. The Licensed Space(s) and the Sales Kiosk shall not be used for any purpose other than as approved and stated
on the Application Form or for the sale of the approved submitted product list/items.
3. We acknowledge that the Licensor is entitled at any time to re-designate any other space(s) (including any of the
Shopping Centre(s) of the Licensor) and any other sales kiosk for MIL’s approved use and purpose within the
Licence Period. We hereby agree not to raise any objection to such re-designation, nor shall we be entitled to any
compensation due to or arising from such re-designation. Upon such re-designation, the “Licensed Space(s)”
and/or “Sales Kiosk” shall mean the space(s) and/or sales kiosk so re-designated.
4. To observe and comply with the followings:
(i) obtain at our own expense all required licences or approvals from government and/or statutory bodies
in connection with MIL’s approved use and purpose of the Licensed Space(s) and the Sales Kiosk;
(ii) comply with all rules and regulations from time to time imposed by the Licensor and/or Manager of the
Shopping Centre(s);
(iii) be wholly responsible for the security of our own goods, fittings and other property in the Licensed
Space(s) and the Sales Kiosk;
(iv) examine the condition of the Sales Kiosk and its facilities carefully before signing a Sales Kiosk
Handover Form. Unless damage is specified on the Sales Kiosk Handover Form, we shall be liable
and responsible for all damage caused or found on the Sales Kiosk and cost of repair and/or
replacement thereof;
(v) maintain public liability insurance in such sum as shall be requested/demanded by the Licensor;
(vi) not to install other facilities or alter the outlook and structure of the Sales Kiosk (each Sales Kiosk will
have 13 AMP socket);
(vii) not to carry out any approved sales activities at any area exceeding 1 metre outside the Sales Kiosk;
(viii) not to assign or sub-license the Licence to any third party and not to allow any third party (except the
employees or staff or agents of MIL) to use or occupy the Licensed Space(s) and the Sales Kiosk;
(ix) not to allow any act(s) done in or around the Licensed Space(s) and the Sales Kiosk which amount(s)
to a nuisance or annoyance to others, or be in breach of any laws;
(x) apply for all required copyright or other licences, and to pay for required licence fees;
(xi) be responsible for all rates, taxes, charges and assessments (if any) in respect of the Licensed
Space(s) and the Sales Kiosk (whether assessed or imposed on the owner or the occupier) if they are
imposed by the Government and/or competent authorities on the Licensed Space(s) and the Sales
Kiosk, except Government rent and Property tax.
5. We acknowledge, understand and agree that the Licensor and MIL shall not be under any liability whatsoever to
us or any person nor they be responsible for any loss injury or damage to us or any third party due to the following
events, nor shall we be entitled to any abatement in the Licence Fee or compensation whatsoever:
(i) the government restriction, breakdown of machinery, failure of electricity supply, leakage or overflow of
water, act of God or any accidents howsoever caused;
(ii) any event(s) or reason(s) that will cause the Licensed Space(s) and/or the Sales Kiosk on the
Shopping Centre(s) to be closed temporarily or permanently.
6. We shall indemnify the Licensor and MIL against all claims, demands, penalties, or charges arising from the
breach of any term or condition herein and any claims arising from clause 5 (i) and/or (ii) above. The acts and/or
default of our agents, servants, invitees or customers shall be deemed as acts and/or default on our part.
P.5 Form AS06 (12/2025)
7. We acknowledge, understand and accept that the Licensor does not warrant and has not made any warranty as
to the quality of the Licensed Space(s) and the Sales Kiosk, their state of repair or maintenance, or their fitness
for MIL’s approved use. The approval of the Licensee’s application herein shall not be deemed as a warranty.
8. Without prejudice to the Licensor’s other rights or remedy against the Licensee, we acknowledge, understand and
agree that the Licence granted hereby is revocable by the Licensor at any time without prior notice to MIL. In such
event, we
acknowledge and agree not to claim against MIL for any loss and damages or compensation whatsoever.
9. Upon revocation or expiry of the Licence hereby granted, we shall remove all set up and/or decoration of the
Licensed Space(s) and the Sales Kiosk, make good all damage caused thereby; vacate and deliver up the
Licensed Space(s) and the Sales Kiosk to the Licensor in a clean and orderly state and in good repair and
condition satisfactory to the Licensor.
10. The operating hours of the Licensed Space(s) and the Sales Kiosk is from 9:00 am to 9:00 pm daily, subject to
the right of the Licensor to alter or amend such time.
11. The Agent confirms that to the best of his/her knowledge, the Agent is not one of the “connected person” to Link
Real Estate Investment Trust within the meaning as defined in Chapter 8.1 of the Code on Real Estate
Investment Trusts published by the Securities and Futures Commission of Hong Kong, as amended,
supplemented or otherwise modified for the time being.
12. We hereby expressly acknowledge, understand and agree that nothing contained in the Licence and the Terms
and Conditions to the Application Form shall permit the carrying out of any entertainment activities which require a
licence under the Places of Public Entertainment Ordinance (Cap.172 of the Laws of Hong Kong).
13. Should we wish to cancel the booking of the Licensed Space(s) after the issuance of the demand note by the
Licensor, we shall pay to the Licensor and/or MIL (as the case may be) either HK$500.00 or 30% of the Licence
Fee (whichever is higher, for each cancelled booking) as administration fee.
14. A person who is not a party to this Application Form has no right under the Contracts (Rights of Third Parties)
Ordinance (Cap. 623) (“Third Parties Ordinance”) to enforce or to enjoy the benefit of any term of this Application
Form. For the avoidance of doubt, this provision shall not affect any right or remedy of a third party which exists,
or is available apart from the Third Parties Ordinance.
15. Any fees, charges and/or penalty arising out of or incidental to the implementation of the municipal solid waste
levy policy or any levy/policy of a similar nature, in respect of solid waste/garbage produced by and/or disposed of
by us or our customers, which may from time to time be assessed or imposed or charged by the relevant statutory
or government authorities on the owner or occupier of the Licensed Space(s) shall be borne and paid by us
absolutely.
16. The rights and obligations of the parties hereunder shall be governed by the laws of the Hong Kong Special
Administrative Region ("Hong Kong") and shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Hong Kong courts.

Letter of Undertakings
(Required for Shop Show with 6 Months or More Duration)
In consideration of Manulife (International) Limited (“MIL”) approving our application to conduct roadshow in the
premises at [ ] (“Premises”)
from [ ] to [ ] (“Roadshow”) as per the Road Show Application Form, we hereby
jointly and severally, unconditionally and irrevocably AGREE, UNDERTAKE, GUARANTEE and INDEMNIFY MIL to
act upon and adhere to the terms and conditions set forth as follows:-
1. The Premises shall not be used for any purpose other than as approved and stated on the Roadshow Application
Form, and shall only be used for the sale of the insurance products approved by MIL.
2. We shall strictly observe and comply with the followings:
(i) obtain at our own expense all required licences or approvals from the Government and/or statutory bodies
in connection with MIL’s approved use and purpose of the Premises;
(ii) fulfil and comply with all obligations and liabilities under the relevant tenancy / license agreement of the
Premises at our own expense;
(iii) comply with all applicable laws and regulations, including but not limited to the rights and obligations of the
tenant under the Landlord and Tenant (Consolidation) Ordinance (Cap. 7 of the Laws of Hong Kong) and
the tenancy agreement, rights and obligations of the licensee under house rules of the Premises, the
Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486 of the Laws of Hong Kong), codes and guidelines published
by the regulatory authorities, including but not limited to the Insurance Authority, the Securities and Futures
Commission and the Mandatory Provident Fund Schemes Authority, and all internal rules and regulations
issued by MIL at all times, and shall not cause any disrepute on part of Manulife;
(iv) be wholly responsible for the security of our own goods, fittings and other properties in the Premises;
(v) take out and maintain at our own expense a valid and adequate insurance policy with a reputable insurance
firm against:-
• loss or damages by fire, flood and other risks and special perils normally insured under a
comprehensive policy of property of the same nature as the Premises; and
• third party claim in respect of any bodily injury or death to any person and loss or damage to the
property of any person caused by or arising out of the Roadshow (including the decorations and
signage within the Premises);
and produce the proof of supporting documents to MIL upon request, and not to act in contravention of the
terms and conditions of the said insurance policy;
(vi) not to carry out any approved sales activities outside the Premises, and shall only use the marketing
materials approved by MIL to conduct sales activities;
(vii) not to allow any third party (except the employees, staff or agents of MIL, customers or permitted licensees)
to use or occupy the Premises;
(viii) not to allow any act(s) done in or around the Premises which amount(s) to a nuisance or annoyance to
others, or be in breach of any laws, including but not limited to the offence of nuisance and obstruction
under the Summary Offences Ordinance (Cap. 228 of the Laws of Hong Kong);
(ix) comply with all applicable laws and regulations including social distancing restrictions and any other
government measures, and shall at all times use our best endeavors to ensure that the operations of the
Roadshow complies in full with the prohibitions on group gathering under the Prevention and Control of
Disease (Prohibition on Group Gathering) Regulation (Cap. 599G of the Laws of Hong Kong) at all times,
and should not cause any disrepute on part of Manulife;
(x) apply for all required copyright or other licences, and to pay for required licence fees; and
(xi) be responsible for all rates, taxes, charges and assessments (if any) in respect of the Premises whether
assessed or imposed on the owner or the occupier if they are imposed by the Government and/or competent
authorities on Premises.
P.7 Form AS06 (12/2025)
We acknowledge, understand and agree that MIL shall not be under any liability whatsoever to us or any person nor
they be responsible for any loss, injury or damage to us or any third party. We shall be wholly responsible for and
fully indemnify MIL against all claims, demands, penalties, or charges, loss, damage or injury caused to any person
whomsoever or to any property whatsoever whether directly or indirectly through the defective or damaged condition
or operation of the Premises arising from and/or incidental to the Roadshow. The acts and/or default of our agents,
servants, invitees or customers shall be deemed as acts and/or default on our part. We shall keep MIL fully indemnified
against all loss, damage, costs, claims, demands, actions and legal proceedings whatsoever made upon MIL by any
person in respect of any loss, damage or injury aforesaid and all costs and expenses incidental thereto.
The rights and obligations of the parties hereunder shall be governed by the laws of the Hong Kong and shall be
subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Hong Kong courts.

 我們同意持牌保險中介人，以委任主事人的代理身份，獲委任或繼續獲委任進行上文第II部分所列明的業務系列。
 於本具報內提交的所有資料均屬完整、真實及準確。
 我們明白，保監局可就本具報作出其認為適當的查詢及尋求其認為適當的進一步資料或文件。

V. 新委任主事人的聲明 (如適用)
持牌保險中介人的所有新委任主事人 (如有) 必須填寫本聲明。
我們謹此確認：
 我們將於上文第II部分所指定的日期委任持牌保險中介人，以委任主事人的代理身份，進行業務系列的受規管活動。
 我們明白及接受，持牌保險中介人獲上文第IV部分所列明的現有委任主事人委任，以現有委任主事人的代理身份，進行受規
管活動。
 我們聲明，據我們所知和所信，於本具報 (或支持本具報) 所提交的所有資料及文件均屬完整、真實及準確。
 我們明白，保監局可就本具報作出其認為適當的查詢及尋求其認為適當的進一步資料或文件。
 我們明白，保監局可對就本具報提供虛假或誤導的資料或遺漏具體的資料的人士採取紀律行動。
 我們相信，持牌保險中介人是一名「適當人選」的人士以進行上文第II部分所列明的業務系列的受規管活動。
 就有關從持牌保險中介人處收集的任何個人資料，我們將遵守《個人資料 (私隱) 條例》(第 486 章) 及由香港個人資料私隱專員
公署發出的所有相關的指引。

持牌經紀公司而言，本具報表格須經其負責人 / 董事 / 獲其董事局會授權的人士 / 獨資經營人 / 合夥人（倘適用）簽署。

收集個人資料聲明
為遵從《個人資料（私隱）條例》（第 486 章）（簡稱《私隱條例》）的通知規定，保險業監管局（「保監局」）制定本《收集個人資料聲明》。
本聲明載述保監局有關你個人資料（定義見《私隱條例》）的政策及常規、保監局收集和使用你個人資料的目的，以及可獲轉移你個人資料的人
士，謹請細閱。
收集目的
保監局可就下列其中一個或多個目的，使用並持有你或任何其他人士於本申請中所提供（及補充證明）的個人資料：
(a) 實施及／或執行保監局依據其獲賦予的權力所制定或頒布且於相關時間生效的任何相關條例 （包括《保險業條例》（第 41 章）（簡稱《條
例》））及任何規例、規則、守則、指引及通函的規定，以及履行其作為保險業監管機構的職能，包括：
(i) 依據《條例》處理你可能向保監局提出或保監局所接獲的任何申請；
(ii) 依據《條例》評核你有關申請牌照或獲批准（視所屬情況而定）的適當人選資格；
(iii) 依據《條例》監察你是否繼續持牌或獲批准（視所屬情況而定）的適當人選；
(iv) 依據《條例》考慮你可能在其他方面與之有關的任何申請；
(v) 依據《條例》於所備存的公眾登記冊中展示和發布個人資料（如適用）；
(vi) 調查投訴和處理查詢；
(vii) 展開法律訴訟、查察、調查，以及採取執法行動或紀律處分；
(b) 在任何適當的時候，以及在香港法律允許的範圍內，配合並協助香港或香港以外任何地方的任何其他監管機構及／或執法機構；
(c) 統計和研究；及／或
(d) 香港法律允許的任何其他目的。
你須按保監局的要求提供所需的個人資料，以便保監局行使其權力或履行其職能（包括處理你的申請）。若未能提供所需的個人資料，則可能導致
保監局無法行使其權力或履行其職能（包括處理你的申請），並可能影響保監局依據《條例》評核你的適當人選資格。
轉移／核對個人資料
保監局根據相關法律及規例履行職能時，可就上述目的將所持你的個人資料披露或轉移予任何第三方，包括香港的金融監管機構 包括但不限於強制
性公積金計劃管理局、證券及期貨事務監察委員會及香港金融管理局）、香港或香港以外的教育機構／考試機構（以便進行資格考核或核實學術／
專業資格）、相關委任主事人 （獲授權保險人、持牌保險代理機構及／或持牌保險經紀公司（視所屬情況而定））、旅行代理商註冊處、香港旅遊
業議會、執法機構、法庭、審裁處及委員會，及／或（在香港法律容許及／或有所規定的情況下）依據保監局與（香港或香港以外的）監管機構或
監管／政府／司法部門之間的任何監管／監督／調查協助安排，披露或轉移予該等機構／部門或獲保監局委聘協助其履行職能的人士。
保監局亦可就對有關資料進行比較、核實及／或核對程序1的目的使用個人資料及／或將個人資料披露或轉移予上述各方。
公眾登記冊
保監局須依據《條例》或任何相關附屬法例備存公眾登記冊，當中載有與持牌保險中介人有關的指定資料。任何公眾人士均可免費查閱公眾登記
冊，以確定與其處事的人士就任何受規管活動而言是否持牌保險中介人或獲持牌保險代理機構／保險經紀公司認可的負責人員，以及確定有關人士
獲發牌照成為持牌保險中介人及／或獲核准成為負責人員的詳情。
查閱資料
根據《私隱條例》，你有權要求查閱及／或更正保監局所持你的個人資料。請填寫「查閱資料要求表格」（可於保監局網站查閱），並以郵遞方式
寄送至保監局的個人資料私隱主任（地址為香港黃竹坑香葉道41號19樓），以便處理你的要求。保監局有權就處理任何有關要求收取合理的費
用。
查詢
任何有關保監局收集、使用或轉移個人資料的查詢，或有關查閱及／或更正保監局所持你個人資料的要求，應以書面形式向以下人士提出：
個人資料私隱主任
保險業監管局
香港黃竹坑香葉道 41 號 19 樓
保監局的私隱政策可於保監局的網站查閱。
1 「核對程序 」的定義見《私隱條例》第 2 條。

i) used by Manulife, its associated companies, employees, third-party vendors/service providers, reinsurers and/or distributors for the purpose of (a) processing my
application, including, but not limited to, determining eligibility and approval; (b) underwriting; (c) handling claim(s) including, but not limited to, administering, assessing,

policy issued in respect of this application); (g) providing customer service, including but not limited to, any follow up on related enquiry and/or communication with you
and/or your representative(s); (h) statistical or actuarial research of Manulife, Manulife's associated companies or the insurance/financial industry; (i) automated/ artificial
intelligence decision making or profiling; (j) complying with applicable laws, regulations and other related purposes;

利、宏利的關聯公司或保險／金融行業所開展的統計或精算研究工作；(i) 基於自動化／人工智能的決策或分析；(j) 遵守適用法律、法規及其他相關目的。
ii) transferred to (a) any related company or other company carrying on insurance or reinsurance related business or an intermediary or a claims or investigation or other

Payment Instructions 付款指示
□By Direct Credit to one of my following bank accounts (only applicable to policyowner’s bank account in HKD currency)
直接存入本人下列其中一個銀行帳戶（只適用於保單持有人之港元戶口）：
□ Current autopay bank account for premium payment 現時繳付保費之自動轉帳銀行帳戶
□ Last bank account for receiving claims payment or policy payment (including dividend, loan payment, regular withdrawal, etc.)
上一次收取理賠金額或保單款項（包括紅利、貸款金額、定期提取金額等）之銀行帳戶
□ Bank account specified below 以下指定的銀行帳戶：
Name of account holder 帳户持有人姓名：
Bank Name Bank No. Branch No. Bank Account No.
銀行名稱 銀行編號 分行編號 銀行帳户號碼
Please provide account proof (e.g. bank statement or bank book copy showing the name of account holder and account number)
請提供帳戶資料證明（如列有帳戶持有人之姓名及帳戶號碼之銀行帳單或銀行存摺影印本）
Remarks 備註:
- Only applicable to payment with daily transaction limit of HKD100,000 per policy. If payment exceeds HKD100,000 or the instruction cannot be executed, it will be issued by cheque.
每份保單每日存款交易上限為港元100,000。如交易超逾港元100,000或無法執行有關付款指示，總額將以支票形式支付。
- The above instruction will replace any existing bank account record/setup for receiving payment including regular withdrawals (if any).
此帳戶資料將取代現時紀錄內/設立收取款項的帳戶包括用作定期提取的帳戶（如有）。
□ By Cheque 以支票形式
Cheque Collection Method 支票交付方法 Cheque Currency (a) (for USD policy only) 支票幣值 (a（) 只適用於美元保單）
□ Through my Insurance Advisor 由本人的保險顧問轉交 □ USD Cheque (drawn in Hong Kong) 美元支票（由香港的銀行付款）
□ By Mail to my latest correspondence address with Manulife □ USD Cheque (drawn in United States) 美元支票（由美國的銀行付款）
寄往本人於宏利紀錄的最新通訊地址 □ HKD Cheque (b) 港元支票 (b)
Notes 註:
(a) In general, it takes a long settlement period to clear a foreign cheque in Hong Kong. Bank charges may be incurred by client for clearing the cheque.
銀行通常需要較長的結算時間於香港兌現外幣支票；另銀行或會向客戶徵收兌現支票的相關手續費。
(b) The HKD equivalent will be based on the currency exchange rate provided by the Company at the time of issue of the cheque and it can be changed from time to time.
相等之港元將會以支票發出時的貨幣兌換率計算，而宏利將不時提供有關的貨幣兌換率。

Declaration and Authorization 聲明及授權
I/We hereby declare that the answers to the above questions are full and true to the best of my/our knowledge. I/We further authorize any physician, hospital, insurance company, claims investigation
company, government authority or organization that has any record or knowledge of me/us, my/our health or my/our activities (including records relating to Social Welfare, Workers’ Compensation,
credit, financial, earnings and employment history) to furnish to Manulife (International) Limited (“Manulife”) or its authorized representative such information including without limitation all information
with respect to any illness or injury, medical history, consultation, prescription or treatment and copies of all hospital or medical records. A photostatic copy of this authorization shall be as effective and
valid as the original.
本人／我們特此聲明填報於本表格內之資料已是本人／我們所知之全部並為真實無訛。本人／我們茲授權任何醫生、醫院、保險公司、賠償調查公司、政府有關部門或其他持有本人／我們個人資料、健康狀
況或記錄（包括有關本人／我們所獲之社會福利及勞工賠償、本人／我們之存款、財政狀況、入息及就業記錄）之組織可以將該等資料，包括但不限於所有有關本人／我們之疾病或受傷，傷患之病歷、診斷報
告、藥方或治療及所有醫院或醫療記錄副本等資料予宏利人壽保險（國際）有限公司（“宏利”）或其代理人。此授權書之複製本與正本具同等效力。
Personal Information Collection Statement 個人資料收集聲明
I/we acknowledge that the personal data provided in this Form will be used by Manulife for the purposes of processing, adjudicating and investigating claims application(s) and request(s) for credit
service, approving and underwriting insurance applications, administering and reinsuring policies, complying with applicable laws and other related purposes and for such purposes, may be transferred
to such persons or entities (whether within or outside Hong Kong) as: (a) any person in connection with any claims made by or against or otherwise involving customers in respect of any products and/or
services; (b) any agent, contractor or third party service provider who provides administrative, telecommunications, computer, information technology, payment, data processing or storage, marketing,
mailing, printing, telemarketing, customer satisfaction analysis, or other services to Manulife or any member of Manulife's group of companies in connection with the operation of business, including
any custodian, administrator, investment manager, investment advisor or distributor; (c) any credit reference agencies or, in the event of default, any debt collection agencies; (d) any advisor (including
his or her employees) or other intermediary (including their employees); (e) reinsurers and medical service providers; (f) employers of the customers; (g) any person which has undertaken to Manulife or
any member of Manulife's group of companies to keep such data confidential; (h) any actual or proposed assignee, transferee, participant or sub-participant of the rights or business of Manulife or any
member of Manulife's group of companies ; (i) any member of Manulife's group of companies; (j) any person to whom Manulife or any member of Manulife's group of companies is under an obligation or
otherwise required to make disclosure under the requirements of any law, rules, regulations, codes of practice, guidelines or guidances binding on or applicable to Manulife or any member of Manulife's
group of companies including but not limited to any local or foreign regulators, governmental bodies, or industry recognised bodies; (k) any person to whom Manulife or any member of Manulife's group
of companies is under an obligation or otherwise required to make disclosure pursuant to any contractual or other commitment or arrangement with local or foreign regulators, governmental bodies, or
industry recognised bodies (whether within or outside Hong Kong) that is assumed by or imposed on Manulife or any member of Manulife's group of companies by reason of its financial, commercial,
business or other interests or activities in or related to the jurisdiction of the relevant local or foreign regulators, governmental bodies, industry recognised bodies. I/we understand that I/we am/are not
obliged to provide such personal data as requested but if I/we refuse to provide such data, Manulife may not be able to proceed further on my/our application(s) and/or request(s) in this Form. I/we may
request access to and correction of my/our personal data held by Manulife, by writing to Privacy Officer at Manulife (International) Limited, 22/F., Tower A, Manulife Financial Centre, 223-231 Wai Yip
Street, Kwun Tong, Kowloon, Hong Kong.
本人／我們確認載於本表格內之個人資料將被宏利用以處理、判定及調查有關之索償及代繳費用服務申請，批核及承保保險申請，管理保單並安排分保，遵守適用法律及其他相關用途並就此等用途，該等個人資料
可被轉送到下列人士或機構（無論在香港境內還是境外）（a）與客戶、針對客戶或涉及客戶就任何產品及／或服務提起的任何索賠相關的任何人士；（b）向宏利或宏利的公司集團任何成員提供與業務經營相關的行政
管理、電信通訊、電腦、資訊技術、付款、資料處理或儲存、市場推廣、郵寄、列印、電話行銷、客戶滿意度分析或其他服務的任何代理、承辦商或第三方服務供應商，包括任何託管人，執行人，投資管理人，投資顧問或
分銷商；（c）任何信貸資料服務機構或（如出現付款違約）任何債務托收機構；（d）任何顧問（包括其僱員）或其他中介人士／機構（包括其僱員）；（e）再保險商和醫療服務供應商；（f）客戶的僱主；（g）已向宏利或
宏利的公司集團任何成員承諾將對該等資料保密的任何人士；（h）宏利或宏利的公司集團任何成員的權利或業務的任何實際或擬議受讓人、承讓人、參與人或次級參與人；（i）宏利的公司集團任何成員；（j）宏利或
宏利的公司集團任何成員根據對其有約束力或適用的任何法律、法規、規章、守則、指引或指南的規定有義務或必須向其披露的任何人士，其中包括但不限於任何當地或外國的監管機構、政府機構或公認行業組織；
（k）根據由於宏利或宏利的公司集團任何成員在相關當地或外國監管機構、政府機構、或公認行業組織（無論在香港境內還是境外）所在司法管轄區的或涉及該等司法管轄區的財務、商業、業務或其他利益或活動
而由宏利或宏利的公司集團任何成員承擔或施加給其的、與該等當地或外國監管機構、政府機構、公認行業組織之間的任何合同、其他承諾或安排，有義務或必須向其披露的任何人士。本人／我們明白本人／我們並
無責任提供該等個人資料。但如果本人／我們拒絕提供該等資料，宏利可未能繼續處理本人／我們的申請及／或本表
格內之申請.本人／我們可去信個人資料主任於宏利人壽保險(國際)有限公司，香港九龍觀塘偉業街223-231號宏利金融中心A座22樓要求查閱及更改本人／我們在宏利之個人資料。

text:
Policy No.

CLAIM FORM
FOR MAJOR DISEASE -
KIDNEY FAILURE
重病保障索償表格 － 腎衰竭
PART II – This Attending Physician’s Statement must be completed by a qualified and registered physician at the insured’s expense
第二部份 – 本應診醫生報告必須由受保人自費聘請之合資格註冊醫生填寫
1. Name of Patient 病人姓名 2. I.D. Card No. 身份證號碼 3. Age 年齡
4. Are you the patient's usual medical attendant? 閣下是否病人之私人醫生？
No 否 Yes 是 If "Yes", give details 若「是」，請填寫有關資料。
Period of Consultation Past Health History
應診期間 病人過往健康情況
5. a) Date on which you first attended the patient for this disease (Kidney Failure).首次為病人診治是項病症（腎衰竭）之日期。
b) How long do you believe the symptoms had been present when you were first consulted?於首次診治時，閣下相信病徵已出現了多久？
c) When was the patient informed of the diagnosis? ( Please give exact date ) 何時通知病人診斷結果？（請填寫準確日期）
6. Give full and exact details of the diagnosis. 請詳盡填寫確實診斷資料。
7. Had the patient any past history of the disease specified above or related illness? 病人過往曾否患有上述疾病或有關疾病？
No 否 Yes 有 If "Yes", give details 若「有」，請填寫有關資料。
Name of Attended Physician(s) Date of Consultation Address(es) Exact Diagnosis
應診醫生姓名 診治日期 地址 確實診斷資料
8. Is there anything in the patient's family history which would have increased the risk of Kidney Failure? 病人之家庭背景有否任何增加病人患上腎衰竭機會之事項？
9. Please give details of the patient's habits in relation to alcohol, drugs and smoking. 請填寫病人飲酒、吸毒或吸煙習慣之詳情。
10. What is the underlying kidney disease causing renal failure? 導致腎衰竭之腎病是甚麼？
11. Had the patient's renal disease reached end-stage? 病人之腎病是否已達末期階段？
12. Is the patient currently undergoing regular peritioneal dialysis or haemodialysis? 病人是否現正接受定期腹膜滲析或血液滲析治療？
13. Has renal transplantation been scheduled or performed? 是否已安排或已進行換腎手術？
If yes, please give the date. 若「是」，請填寫有關日期。
14. Please provide details of physicians to whom the patient has been referred or attended for this disease. 請提供曾為病人診治是項病症之醫生資料。
(We would be grateful for copies of any relevant medical report that are available ) （敬請提供任何有關醫療報告副本）
Name of Physician(s) and/or Hospital(s) Address(es) Date of Consultation(s) and/or Period of Confinement(s)
醫生姓名及／或醫院名稱 地址 診治及／或留院日期
15. If there is any further information which, in your opinion, will assist us in assessing this claim, please furnish such information below.
閣下認為有否其他資料可協助本公司審核是項索償申請？請提供有關資料。
5

Qualification 資格 Tel. No. 電話號碼

 No 否 Yes 是 If "Yes", give details 若「是」，請填寫有關資料。

b) How long had the patient been experiencing the symptoms/complaints before the first consultation? 病人在首次求診前已患有症狀／主訴多久？(DD日/MM月/YYYY年)
c) Symptoms (s) / complaint(s) of the patient relating to this disease (cancer) 病人就是項病症(癌病)所出現的症狀/主訴
d) When was the patient informed of the diagnosis? (Please give exact date) 何時通知病人診斷結果？（請填寫準確日期）(DD日/MM月/YYYY年)

 No 否 Yes 是 If "Yes", give details 若「有」，請填寫確實診斷資料。

應診醫生姓名及/或醫院名稱 診治日期(日/月/年) 地址 確實診斷資料
8.Is there anything in the patient's family history which would have increased the risk of Cancer? 病人之家庭背景有否任何增加病人患上癌症機會之事項？
n No 否 n Yes 有 If "Yes ", give details 若「有」，請填寫有關資料。
9.Did or does the patient have any habits in relation to drinking, drug taking and smoking. 病人是否或曾有飲酒、吸毒或吸煙之習慣？
Duration持續時間
From 由 (DD日/MM月/YYYY年) To 至 (DD日/MM月/YYYY年) Consumption Per Day 每天用量：
a) Drinking 飲酒 n No 否 n Yes是

10. a) What was the site or organ involved and the precise histology of the tumor? 請填寫腫瘤所處之位置或受影響之器官，及詳列腫瘤之組織結構?
b) What tests were performed to confirm the diagnosis? 進行了哪些測試來確認此診斷？
Date of the Test 檢驗日期 (DD日/MM月/YYYY年) Test item 檢驗項目 Result 結果
c) What was the staging system used? 腫瘤之分期系統?
(For cancer, pleases state stage under the American Joint Committee on Cancer (AJCC) cancer staging system; for brain tumour, please state stage
under World Health Organization Classification of Tumours; for Hodgkin lymphoma or Non-Hodgkin lymphoma, please state stage under the Lugano
classification; for chronic lymphocytic leukaemia, please stage the Rai stage)
(如屬癌症，請根據美國癌症聯合委員會 (American Joint Committee on Cancer) 癌症分期系統分類列出其級別 ;如屬腦腫瘤，請根據世界衛生組織腫瘤分類（
WHO Classification of Tumours）列出其級別）; 如屬何傑金淋巴瘤或非何傑金淋巴瘤，請根據盧加諾分期法 (Lugano Classification ）列出其級別; 如屬慢性淋巴
球白血ˆ病，請列出其Rai級別)
d) Based on above staging system, what is the staging of the tumour? 根據以上分期系統，該腫瘤為第幾級別?
e) Is the disease completely localized? 病症是否完全局部化？ n No 否 n Yes是
f) Is there uncontrolled growth and spread of malignant cells? 癌細胞是否不受控制地生長及擴散？ n No 否 n Yes是
g) Is there an invasion and destruction of adjacent tissue by malignant cells? 癌細胞是否侵入和破壞鄰近細胞組織？ n No 否 n Yes是
h) Are regional lymph nodes involved? 是否影響鄰近淋巴結？ n No 否 n Yes是
i) Are there distant metastases? 是否距離性轉移？ n No 否 n Yes是
11.Please provide details of physicians to whom the patient has been referred or attended for this disease. 請提供曾為病人診治是項病症之醫生資料。
(We would be grateful for copies of any relevant medical report that are available ) （敬請提供任何有關醫療報告副本）

醫生姓名及／或醫院名稱 地址 診治及／或留院日期(日/月/年)
12. What kind of treatment(s) is/are the patient receiving/had the patient received? 病人正／曾接受什麼治療?
Treatment 治療 Please list out the treatment dates, period, schedule and details of treatments 請列出治療日期、期間、時間表和治療詳情 (DD日/MM月/YY年)
n Surgery 手術
n Radiotherapy 電療
n Chemotherapy 化療
n Targeted therapy 標靶治療
n Bone marrow transplant 骨髓移植
n Proton therapy 質子治療
n Immunotherapy 免疫治療
n Cyber knife 數碼導航刀
n Gamma knife 伽瑪刀
n CAR-T cell infusion
嵌合抗原受體T細胞(CAR-T) 細胞滴注
n Hyperthermia therapy 高溫熱療
n Photodynamic therapy (PDT)
光動力療法(PDT)
n Stem cell therapy 幹細胞治療
n Clinical trial cancer drug treatment
臨床試驗癌症藥物治療*
n Off-label cancer drug treatment
非適應症癌症藥物治療*
n Others, please specify 其他，請註明:
* Please answer question 14 if patient is receiving/had received Clinical Trial Cancer Drug Treatment and/or Off-label Cancer Treatment 如病人正／曾接受「臨床試

(c) In general, it takes a longer settlement period to clear a foreign cheque in Hong Kong. Bank charges may be incurred by client for clearing the cheque. 銀行通常

No 否 Yes 是 If "Yes", give details 若「是」，請填寫有關資料。
Period of Consultation Past Health History
應診期間 病人過往健康情況
5. a) Date on which you first attended the patient for this disease (Progressive Muscular Atrophy). 首次為病人診治是項病症（進行性肌肉萎縮）之日期。
b) What was the symptom(s) experienced prior to the first consultation? And for how long? 病人首次求診前有何症狀？該等症狀已存在多久？
c) When was the patient informed of the diagnosis? (Please give exact date) 何時通知病人診斷結果？（請填寫準確日期）

病人之家庭背景有否任何增加病人患上進行性肌肉萎縮機會之事項？

病人是否經神經科顧問醫生診斷患有該疾病？如是，請提供該醫生的姓名及地址。

病人有否出現肌肉萎縮及／或痙攣加劇？

請提供放射檢驗、磁力共振、電腦斷層掃描、實驗室證據或其他檢驗結果的詳情以供參考。

病人之家庭背景有否任何增加病人患上完全及永久傷殘機會之事項？

Policy No.
保單編號：
10. Which of the following daily activities and the period is he/she NOT able to perform as a result of the disability? If the activity can be performed by using special
equipment, then he/she is considered able to perform that activity. 他/她因殘疾而無法進行哪些日常生活之活動以及相關的時段? 若相關的日常生活之活動可通過使用特殊設
備進行仍可視為他/她能夠進行該活動。
If NOT able to perform below daily activities as a result of the disability, please tick below box(es) Period not able to perform as a result of the disability
如因殘疾而無法進行下列日常生活之活動, 請於以下的方格內填上“✓” 號 因殘疾而無法進行此活動的時段 (DD日/MM月/YY年)
 A) Washing - the ability to wash in the bath or shower (including getting into and out of the bath or
shower) or wash satisfactorily by other means. 沐浴 － 浸浴或淋浴方式自我清洗（包括能進入及離開
浴缸或淋浴間）或以其他方式達到滿意自我清洗的能力。
 
B) Dressing - the ability to put on, take off, secure and unfasten all garments and, as appropriate,
any braces, artificial limbs or other surgical appliances. 更衣 － 穿戴並固定及解開並脫下所有衣物及
任何矯正器、義肢或其他醫學用支架(視何者適用而定)的能力。
 C) Transferring - the ability to move from a bed to an upright chair or wheelchair and vice versa. 行
動 － 從床移動至直立的椅子或輪椅上的能力，反之亦然。
 D) Mobility - the ability to move indoors from room to room on level surfaces. 移動 － 於平坦地面之室
內由一個房間移動到另一房間的自由活動能力。
 
E) Toileting - the ability to use the lavatory or otherwise manage bowel and bladder functions so as
to maintain a satisfactory level of personal hygiene. 如廁 － 自行如廁或能自我控制肛門及膀胱功能，
以保持合理程度之個人衛生的能力。
 F) Feeding - the ability to feed oneself once food has been prepared and made available. 進食 － 自
行進食預先準備妥當及獲提供之食物的能力。
11. Is the patient suffered from total and permanent disability? If yes, how long has the patient suffered from this disability. If not, please explain.
病人是否完全及永久傷殘？如是，病人的傷殘情況已持續多久？如否，請加以說明。
12. Is the disability permanent in nature?
病人是否屬永久傷殘？
13. In your professional opinion, is the patient unable to perform any work for remuneration or profit? If yes, please explain.
根據閣下的專業意見，病人是否無法從事任何可獲報酬或利潤之職業或工作？如是，請加以說明。
14. Please give details of radiological investigations, M.R.I., C T scan, laboratory evidence and any other test results for reference.
請提供放射檢驗、磁力共振、電腦斷層掃描、實驗室證據或其他檢驗結果的詳情以供參考。
15. Please provide details of physicians to whom the patient has been referred or attended for this disease. 請提供曾為病人診治是項病症之醫生資料。

CLAIM FORM Policy No.
保單編號：
FOR MAJOR DISEASE -
BENIGN BRAIN TUMOUR
重病保障索償表格 － 良性腦腫瘤
PART II – This Attending Physician’s Statement must be completed by a qualified and registered physician at the insured’s expense
第二部份 – 本應診醫生報告必須由受保人自費聘請之合資格註冊醫生填寫
1. Name of Patient 病人姓名 2. I.D. Card No. 身份證號碼 3. Age 年齡
4. Are you the patient's usual medical attendant? 閣下是否病人之私人醫生？
No 否 Yes 是 If "Yes", give details 若「是」，請填寫有關資料。
Period of Consultation Past Health History
應診期間 病人過往健康情況
5. a) Date on which you first attended the patient for this disease (Benign Brain Tumour). 首次為病人診治是項病症（良性腦腫瘤）之日期。
b) What was the symptom(s) experienced prior to the first consultation? And for how long? 病人首次求診前有何症狀？該等症狀已存在多久？
c) When was the patient informed of the diagnosis? (Please give exact date) 何時通知病人診斷結果？（請填寫準確日期）
6. Give full and exact details of the diagnosis. 請詳盡填寫確實診斷資料。
7. Had the patient any past history of the disease specified above or related illness? 病人過往曾否患有上述疾病或有關疾病？
No 否 Yes 有 If "Yes", give details 若「有」，請填寫有關資料。
Name of Attended Physician(s) Date of Consultation Address(es) Exact Diagnosis
應診醫生姓名 診治日期 地址 確實診斷資料
8. Is there anything in the patient's family history which would have increased the risk of Benign Brain Tumour? 病人之家庭背景有否任何增加病人患上良性腦腫瘤機會之事項？
9. Please give details of the patient's habits in relation to alcohol, drugs and smoking. 請填寫病人飲酒、吸毒或吸煙習慣之詳情。
10. Please describe the underlying cause of Benign Brain Tumour. 請指出導致良性腦腫瘤之原因。
11. Was the disease diagnosed by a consultant neurologist? If so, please provide us with the name and address of neurologist.
病人是否經神經科顧問醫生診斷患有該疾病？如是，請提供該醫生的姓名及地址。
12. Please give details of the severity of the illness with respect to the followings: 請就以下方面描述病人的病情：
a) Is the tumour benign? What was the histology of the tumour? 病人的腫瘤是否屬良性？請說明腫瘤的組織。
b) Which part of the brain was involved? Was it completely localized? If not, was the pituitary gland or spine also involved? 腫瘤涉及腦部哪個部位？是否已完全
局限化？如否，是否涉及腦下垂體或腦脊椎？
c) Is the tumour in the form of cysts, granulomas, haematomas, other malformations in the arteries or veins of the brain? 病人的腫瘤是否屬水囊腫、肉芽瘤、血腫，
或腦動脈或靜脈畸形？
d) Was there any surgical removal performed? If yes, please provide the surgery name and date. 是否進行過手術切除？如是，請提供手術名稱和日期。
e) Please comment on any significant neurological functional impairment caused by the tumour? If yes, how long has it lasted and is it permanent in nature?
請評論腫瘤是否造成了任何顯著的神經系統功能受損？如是，持續了多久？是永久性的嗎？
13. Please give details of radiological investigations, M.R.I., C T scan, laboratory evidence and any other test results for reference.
請提供放射檢驗、磁力共振、電腦斷層掃描、實驗室證據或其他檢驗結果的詳情以供參考。
14. Please provide details of physicians to whom the patient has been referred or attended for this disease. 請提供曾為病人診治是項病症之醫生資料。

business, including any custodian, administrator, investment manager, investment advisor or distributor; (c) any credit reference agencies or, in the
event of default, any debt collection agencies; (d) any advisor (including his or her employees) or other intermediary (including their employees);
(e)reinsurers and medical service providers; (f) employers of the customers; (g) any person which has undertaken to Manulife or any member
of Manulife's group of companies to keep such data confidential; (h) any actual or proposed assignee, transferee, participant or sub-participant
of the rights or business of Manulife or any member of Manulife's group of companies ; (i) any member of Manulife's group of companies; (j) any
person to whom Manulife or any member of Manulife's group of companies is under an obligation or otherwise required to make disclosure under
the requirements of any law, rules, regulations, codes of practice, guidelines or guidances binding on or applicable to Manulife or any member of
Manulife's group of companies including but not limited to any local or foreign regulators, governmental bodies, or industry recognised bodies; (k)
any person to whom Manulife or any member of Manulife's group of companies is under an obligation or otherwise required to make disclosure
pursuant to any contractual or other commitment or arrangement with local or foreign regulators, governmental bodies, or industry recognised
bodies (whether within or outside Hong Kong) that is assumed by or imposed on Manulife or any member of Manulife's group of companies by
reason of its financial, commercial, business or other interests or activities in or related to the jurisdiction of the relevant local or foreign regulators,
governmental bodies, industry recognised bodies. I/we understand that I/we am/are not obliged to provide such personal data as requested but
if I/we refuse to provide such data, Manulife may not be able to proceed further on my/our application(s) and/or request(s) in this Form. I/we may
request access to and correction of my/our personal data held by Manulife, by writing to Privacy Officer at Manulife (International) Limited, 22/F.,
Tower A, Manulife Financial Centre, 223-231 Wai Yip Street, Kwun Tong, Kowloon, Hong Kong.

不限於任何當地或外國的監管機構、政府機構或公認行業組織；（k）根據由於宏利或宏利的公司集團任何成員在相關當地或外國監管機構、政府機構、

Certification of Long Term Disability
Name of Insured: Date of Birth: (DD/MM/YYYY)
INSTRUCTIONS: This certification must be completed and signed by a registered nurse, registered social worker or licensed
physician who is not a blood relative of the Insured named above.
SECTION A
Based upon my assessment of the above named Insured on (DD/MM/YYYY), and in my professional opinion
as certified by my signature below, the Insured requires hands-on or stand-by (within arm’s reach) assistance to perform the following Activities
of Daily Living (ADLs):
c Insured does not require assistance with ADLs listed below (Proceed to Section B)
c Transferring: moving in and out of chair or bed, with or without equipment.
c Toileting: getting to and from and off toilet, maintaining a reasonable level of personal hygiene and care of clothing.
c Bathing: washing oneself either in tub or shower, or by sponge bath, with or without equipment or adaptive devices.
c Dressing: put on and take off all garments, including fastening and unfastening medically necessary braces or artificial limbs usually worn.
c Continence: voluntarily control bowel and bladder functions, or in the event of incontinence, ability to maintain reasonable level of personal hygiene.
c Eating: getting nourishment into body by any means once it is prepared and made available.
I certify that the Insured requires Substantial Assistance with the checked activities for a period expected to last at least (check one):
c 30 days c 60 days c 90 days or more c 180 days or more
SECTION B
Based upon my assessment of the above named Insured, and the definitions below of Severe Cognitive Impairment and Substantial Supervision,
I certify by my signature below that (check the correct statement) :
c The Insured HAS a Severe Cognitive Impairment requiring Substantial Supervision. Attach documentation of diagnosis and standardized
tests or measures performed.
c The Insured DOES NOT have a Severe Cognitive Impairment that requires Substantial Supervision.
Severe Cognitive Impairment – “Severe Cognitive Impairment” means a loss or deterioration in intellectual capacity that is:
a) some form of irreversible dementia; and
b) measured by medical evidence and standardized tests that reliably measure impairment in the individual’s short-term or long-term
memory; orientation as to people, places or time; deductive or abstract reasoning; and judgment as it relates to safety awareness; and
c) clinically confirmed by an appropriate consultant.
Dementia is a brain syndrome that causes deterioration in intellectual function and other cognitive skills, as well as a decline in the ability to
perform Activities of Daily Living. Typically, it causes progressive loss of memory, behavior changes and loss of functional ability.
Severe Cognitive Impairment results in a person’s inability to care for self without Substantial Supervision by another person.
Substantial Assistance – “Substantial Assistance” means the life insured r.equires (a) the physical assistance of another human being to
perform the Activity of Daily Living; or (b) the presence of another human being within arm’s reach of the life insured that is necessary to
prevent by physical intervention, injury to the life insured while the life insured is performing the Activity of Daily Living (such as being ready
to catch the life insured if the life insured falls while getting into or out of the bathtub or shower as part of bathing).
Substantial Supervision – “Substantial Supervision” means the life insured requires continual supervision (which may include cuing by
verbal prompting, gestures, or other demonstrations), by another human being that is necessary to protect the life insured from threats to
health or safety as a result of the life insured’s Severe Cognitive Impairment.
SECTION C
Primary Disabling Diagnosis (if any):

長期傷殘證明書
受保人姓名： 出生日期： （日／月／年）
提示：此證明書必須由註冊護士、註冊社工或註冊醫生填寫及簽署，而有關人士並非上述受保人之血緣親屬。
根據本人在 （日／月／年）對上述受保人之評估，及本人經簽署作實的專業意見，受保人需要他人立即或隨時準備（就近
位置）的協助，才可完成下列「日常生活活動」:
c 受保人並不需要下列日常生活活動的協助（跳至第二部份）
c 行動: 不論是否需要借助工具，能坐上及離開座椅及上落床。
c 如廁: 能往返洗手間；坐上及離開座廁；整理身上衣物，並保持合理程度之個人衛生。
c 沐浴: 不論是否需要借助任何工具、儀器或特別裝置，能以浸浴、淋浴方式或以海綿自我清洗。
c 更衣: 能穿帶並固定以及解開並脫下所有衣物、醫學用支架或矯正器，及須經常配帶之義肢 。
c 自制: 能自我控制肛門及膀胱功能。在失禁之情況下，能保持合理程度之個人衛生。
c 進食: 不論採用任何方法，能自行進食預先準備妥當之食物。
本人證實受保人就已選項目需要「實質協助」，並預期維持至少下列日數（選出一項）：
c 30天 c 60天 c 90天或以上 c 180天或以上
根據本人對上述受保人之評估，及按照下列有關「嚴重認知能力缺損」及「實質監督」的定義，本人簽署證實下列項目（選出合適的陳述）：
c 受保人有「嚴重認知能力缺損」，並需要「實質監督」。現隨證明書附上診斷文件及標準測試或量度資料。
c 受保人並無需要「實質監督」之「嚴重認知能力缺損」。
嚴重認知能力缺損 –「嚴重認知能力缺損」指失去智力或智力退化如下：
a) 不可逆轉之癡呆；及
b) 經醫學證據及標準測試之量度，可靠地顯示個人的短期或長期記憶之缺損；對人、地點或時間的確定能力之缺損；抽象性或推論性思考能力之缺
損；及有關安全意識的判斷能力缺損；及
c) 經合適顧問的臨床證實。
癡呆是導致智力機能及其他認知能力衰退的腦部綜合症，並包括進行「日常生活活動」能力之衰退。典型的情況會導致逐漸失憶、行為改變及喪失機
能。「嚴重認知能力缺損」應該導致個人未能在沒有「實質監督」下照顧自己。
實質協助 ─「實質協助」指受保人需要(a)另一人提供物理協助以進行「日常生活活動」；或(b)另一人在旁隨時提供協助，以免受保人因進行「日常生
活活動」而受傷。（例如：隨時準備攙扶在沐浴時進入或離開浴缸或淋浴時摔跌之受保人。）
實質監督 ─「實質監督」指受保人因「嚴重認知能力缺損」，以致需要另一人提供持續之監督。（當中可能包括言語、動作、或其他示範等方式的提
示），以保障其個人之健康及安全免受威脅。

姓名： 執照編號：
地址：
聯絡電話：

14. Has the patient undergone surgical correction for cerebral aneurysm or arteriovenous malformation? 病人有否就腦動脈瘤或腦動靜脈畸形接受矯正手術？
Yes 有 No 沒有
If “Yes”, the type of surgical procedure performed? 如“有”，進行了何種手術程序?
a) Intracranial surgery through a craniotomy 透過顱骨切開術進行顱內手術 Yes 有 No 沒有
b) Endovascular intervention procedures such as endovascular embolization, endovascular coiling, angioplasty and/or stenting or the insertion of a flow diverter
進行血管介入治療，如經血管內栓塞治療、經血管內盤繞治療、血管成形術及/或植入支架或置入流量分流器
c) If any one of the above 2 questions is “Yes”, please specify the name of the procedure done for cerebral aneurysm: 如以上兩項任何一項為“有”，請列出就腦動
脈瘤或腦動靜脈畸形進行的手術程序名稱：
d) If none of the above surgeries has been done, please state what other types of surgery was performed. 如沒有進行上述手術，請列出所進行之其他矯正手術。
e) Date and place of surgery 手術日期及地點
Date of surgery 手術日期：( / / ) DD/MM/YYYY 日／月／年
The hospital where the surgery was performed 手術醫院：
Name of Surgeon 手術醫生姓名：
f) The surgery was performed for: 進行之手術用作：
Clipping an aneurysm of cerebral arteries or arteriovenous malformation 夾剪腦動脈內的動脈瘤或腦動靜脈畸形
Repairing an aneurysm of cerebral arteries or arteriovenous malformation 修復腦動脈內的動脈瘤或腦動靜脈畸形
Removing an aneurysm of cerebral arteries or arteriovenous malformation 切除腦動脈內的動脈瘤或腦動靜脈畸形
Preventing rupture of a cerebral aneurysm or arteriovenous malformation 預防腦動脈瘤或腦動靜脈畸形破裂
Alleviating the bleeding due to rupture of a cerebral aneurysm or arteriovenous malformation 減輕因腦動脈瘤或腦動靜脈畸形破裂而導致出血
Others (please specify) : 其他（請註明）：

5. a) Date on which the patient first consulted you related to the condition (Kawasaki Disease). 病人就是項疾病（川崎病）首次向閣下求診的日期
（DD日/ MM月/YY年）。

( / / ) DD/MM/YYYY 日／月／年

會之事項？
9. Please give details of the patient's habits in relation to alcohol, drugs and smoking. 請填寫病人飲酒、吸毒或吸煙習慣之詳情。

11. How many coronary arteries are involved? 多少條冠狀動脈受影響？
Has there been persistent dilation or aneurysm formation in any one of the coronary arteries? 任何一條冠狀動脈有沒有持續擴張或有動脈瘤形成的情況發生?
Yes 有 No 沒有

張或有動脈瘤形成的狀況是否已持續最少六(6)個月? Yes 是 No 否

If aneurysm has been formed, please specify the location and the size of the aneurysm. (Please supplement with relevant scan or imaging reports.) 如有動脈瘤形成，
請列出動脈瘤的位置及其體形大小。（請提供相關的電腦掃描或影像報告以供參考。）

Was it congenital in nature? 該疾病是否由先天性殘缺或疾病而導致？ Yes 是 No 否
13. Please enclose copies of all reports including X-rays, ECGs, CT Scans, Ultrasound, Cardiac Catheterization, other imaging studies, laboratory evidence, etc, and any
relevant hospital reports that are available. 請提所有報告包括X-光檢查，心電圖，電腦掃描，超聲波，心臟導管檢查及其他影像報告，化驗報告等，或任何有關的醫院報告。

Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) 自閉症譜系障礙
8. Please complete this questionnaire if the patient is diagnosed with Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD). 如病人確診自閉症譜系障礙，請填寫以下問題：
NO YES
(a) Qualitative impairment of social interaction 社交能力缺陷: 否 是
(i) Marked impairment in the use of multiple types of non-verbal behavior such as eye to eye gaze facial expression, body postures, and 
gestures to regulate social interaction 在多種非語言行為方面出現顯著的缺陷。非語言行為包括使用眼對眼凝視，面部表情，身體姿勢及姿態等
來調節社交互動
(ii) Failure to develop peer relationships appropriate to developmental level 無法建立跟自己發展水平相符合的朋輩關係 
(iii) Lack of spontaneous seeking to share enjoyment, interests or achievements with other people (e.g. by lack of showing, bringing, or pointing 
out objects of interest) 缺乏自我尋找與別人分享樂趣，興趣或成就的能力（例如：缺乏表現、帶出或指出感興趣的事物）
(iv) Lack of social or emotional reciprocity 缺乏社交或感情的互動 
(b) Qualitative impairment of communication 溝通能力缺陷 :
(i) Delay in, or lack of development of spoken language (not accompanied by an attempt to compensate through alternative modes of 
communication such as gestures or mime) 語言能力缺乏或發展遲緩（沒有試圖過其他的溝通模式，如以肢體動作或以手勢來補充）
(ii) In individuals with adequate speech, marked impairment in the ability to initiate or sustain a conversation with others 雖然有足夠語言能力， 
但明顯缺乏與他人發起談話和維持談話的能力
(iii)Stereotyped and repetitive use of language or idiosyncratic language 刻板地重覆使用同樣語句或怪癖的語句 
(iv) Lack of varied, spontaneous make-believe play or social imitative play appropriate to developmental level 較其同等發育水平程度的兒童，缺 
乏有變化的假扮角色遊戲或模仿社交遊戲
(c) Restrictive and stereotyped patterns of behavior, interests, and activities 拘謹且刻板的行為、興趣及活動
(i) All-encompassing preoccupation with one or more restricted, repetitive, and stereotyped patterns of interest that is abnormal either in 
intensity or focus 全神貫注於一種或多種的有限的、重覆的及刻板的興趣模式並顯得過度強烈及集中
(ii) Apparently inflexible adherence to specific, non-functional routines or rituals 呆板地遵循一些特定並無意義的常規行為或儀式 
(iii) Stereotyped and repetitive motor mannerisms (e.g. hand or finger flapping or twisting, or complex whole-body movements) 重覆的作出一些小 
動作（例如：手或手指上下或左右擺動或扭動、或整個身體移動不定）
(iv) Persistent preoccupation with parts of objects. 持續性關注某物體的某部份 
(d) Please state the patient's severity level for Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) according to Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders
(Fifth Edition – Text Revision) (DSM-5-TR). 請根據《精神疾病診斷與統計手冊》(第五版 - 修訂版) (DSM-5-TR) 說明病人自閉症譜系障礙的嚴重程度。
 Level 3 (Severe) - Requiring very substantial support 第3級 (嚴重）- 需要非常大量的支援
 Level 2 (Moderate) - Requiring substantial support 第2級 (中度)- 需要大量支援
 Level 1 (Mild) - Requiring support 第1級 ( 輕微) - 需要支援
(e) Was the Autism Spectrum Disorder diagnosis supported by the records of structured clinical interviews, assessments or tests? 是否就該自閉症
譜系障礙進行有系統臨床面談、評估或測試?
 No否 Yes有 If yes, please provide details of those records 如是，請提供有關紀錄
Date日期 Type of interview / assessment / test (E.g. Autism Diagnostic Result / Finding 結果或發現
(DD日/MM月/YYYY年) Observation Schedule (ADOS) /Childhood Autism Rating Scale (Please affix a copy of the records. 請提供有關紀錄)
(CARS) /therapy records/ school reports etc) 面談、評估或測試
類(如自閉症診斷觀察量表/兒童自閉症量表/治療報告/學校評估等)
(f) Has the patient's Autism Spectrum Disorder condition been continued without interruption for a period of at least six months after diagnosis?
以上徵狀在病人確定診斷後是否不間斷地持續至少六個月?
 No否 Yes有
(g) Please provide details of psychosocial intervention, special education, and/or behavior therapy carried out. 請提供社交心理治療和／或特殊教育
和／或行為治療的詳細資料

Attention Deficit / Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) 專注力不足/過度活躍症
9. Please complete this questionnaire if the patient is diagnosed with Attention Deficit / Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD).
如病人確診專注力不足/過度活躍症，請填寫以下問題：
(a) Inattention, or Hyperactivity and Impulsivity 專注力弱或過度活躍及行為衝動: NO YES
否 是
(i) Inattention: At least six (6) symptoms of inattention as characterized by DSM-5 / ICD-10 which have persisted for at least six (6) months to a 
degree that is inconsistent with developmental level and negatively impacts directly on social and academic activities 專注力弱：根據DSM-5
或ICD-10的準則下，持續最少六個月出現最少六項專注力弱的徵狀，以致其程度與發育水平不一致，及對社交及學術活動有直接負面影響
(ii) Hyperactivity and Impulsivity: At least six (6) symptoms of hyperactivity and impulsivity as characterized by DSM-5 / ICD-10 which have 
persisted for at least six (6) months to a degree that is inconsistent with developmental level and negatively impacts directly on social and
academic activities; And such behaviors have been going on since the patient was young 過度活躍及行為衝動：根據DSM-5或ICD-10的準則
下，持續最少六個月出現最少六項過度活躍及行為衝動的徵狀，以致其程度與發育水平不一致，及對社交及學術活動有直接負面影響。同時，病人自小
已持續出現相關行為
(b) Distractibility, hyperactivity, and impulsivity affect the patient at school and at home 分心、過度活躍及行為衝動對病人之學校及家庭生活造 
成影響
(c) A health check shows that the health or learning issue is not caused by other problems 健康檢查顯示健康或學習問題並不是由其他問題所導致 
(d) Patient is undergoing appropriate therapeutic intervention including but not limited to pharmacological treatment prescribed by the 
attending Doctor. 病人是否正接受適當的介入治療，包括不限於由主診醫生處方的藥物治療
(e) Does the patient diagnosed ADHD solely based on the Chinese Classification of Mental Disorders (CCMD) code alone? 診斷是否根 
據《中國精神障礙分類與診斷標準》（CCMD）
(f) Does the patient’s symptom(s) not interfere with or reduce the quality of social and/or academic functioning? 病人徵狀是否沒有干擾或 
降低社交及／或學術功能的質素
(g) Does the patient’s symptom(s) that occur during the course of another disorder or are attributable to the physiological effects of a 
substance or neurological condition and are related to another neurodevelopmental or mental disorder? 病人的徵狀於另一種疾病病程中
出現，並歸因於某種物質或神經系統情況的心理影響，及與另一項神經發展或精神障礙有關
(h) Was the Attention Deficit / Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) diagnosis supported by the records of structured clinical interviews, assessments or
tests? 是否就該專注力不足/過度活躍症進行有系統臨床面談、評估或測試? (Please provide a copy of referral letter to the institute. 請提供有關有關機構的轉介信)
 No否 Yes有 If yes, please provide details of those records 如是，請提供有關紀錄
Date 日期 (DD日/MM月/YYYY年) Type of interview / assessment / test 面談、評估或測試類型 Result / Finding 結果或發現

Tourette Syndrome 妥瑞症
10.Please complete this questionnaire if the patient is diagnosed with Tourette Syndrome. 如病人確診妥瑞症，請填寫以下問題： N 否 O Y 是 ES
(a) All of the specific diagnostic criteria of the condition as defined by DSM-5 or ICD-10 are fulfilled, including Age of diagnosis and all 
other condition specifiers 已經符合DSM-5或ICD-10所有特定的診斷標準，包括確診年齡及所有其他情況指標
(b) The patient must be undergoing appropriate therapeutic intervention including but not limited to therapies prescribed by the attending 
Doctor 病人必須正接受適當的治療干預包括不限於由主診醫生處方的治療
(c) There must be clear evidence that the symptoms of the diagnosed condition interfere with or reduce the quality of social and/or 
academic functioning 必須有明確證明，所診斷疾病之徵狀干擾或降低社交及／或學術功能的質素
(d) Does the patient diagnosed Tourette Syndrome solely based on Chinese Classification of Mental Disorders (CCMD) code? 診斷是否根 
據《中國精神障礙分類與診斷標準（CCMD）?
(e) Does the patient’s symptom(s) of the diagnosed condition occur exclusively during the course of another disorder or are attributable 
to the physiological effects of a substance or neurological condition and are better explained by another neurodevelopmental or
mental disorder? 病人所診斷疾病之徵狀是否只於另一種疾病病程中出現，並歸因於某種藥物或神經系統情況的心理影響，及更好地由另一項神經發育
或精神障礙解釋
(f) Does the patient have any tic disorder other than Tourette Syndrome? 除妥瑞症外，任何抽動障礙 
(g) Was the Tourette Syndrome diagnosis supported by the records of structured clinical interviews, assessments or tests? 是否就該妥瑞症進行有系
統臨床面談、評估或測試? Please provide a copy of referral letter to the institute. 請提供有關有關機構的轉介信
 No否 Yes有 If yes, please provide details of those records 如是，請提供有關紀錄
Date 日期 (DD日/MM月/YYYY年) Type of interview / assessment / test 面談、評估或測試類型 Result / Finding 結果或發現
